questions.question: ML team обнаружила: churn prediction модель использовала future data при training (feature: 'total_orders_next_30d'). Accuracy = 99% в training, бесполезна в production. Какой тип skew и как предотвратить?

options.text: Time-travel skew (data leakage): модель 'видела будущее' при training. Fix: point-in-time joins. Для каждого training example at time T — использовать features AS OF time T (не latest). Feature store: get_historical_features() автоматически делает point-in-time correct joins

questions.explanation: Time-travel skew = data leakage. Feature 'total_orders_next_30d' использует будущие данные → 99% accuracy is meaningless. Point-in-time joins: for training example at 2024-01-15, use features computed from data BEFORE 2024-01-15 only. Feast get_historical_features() handles this automatically.

questions.question: 4 ML команды независимо вычисляют feature 'customer_lifetime_value'. Каждая реализация немного отличается. Как решить?

options.text: Feature reuse через Feature Store: одно определение customer_ltv в feature repository (Git). Compute pipeline: одна Spark job → offline + online store. 4 команды потребляют один feature через Feast API. Изменения — через PR review

questions.explanation: Feature reuse = core value proposition Feature Store. One definition → one compute → consistent values across all consumers. Git-based feature repository: changes через PR → review → merge → auto-deploy. 4 × custom implementations → 1 × shared feature. Documentation (a) alone doesn't enforce consistency.

questions.question: ML модель в production использует feature avg_order_value_30d. Feature Store offline store обновляется ежедневно (batch). Online store обновляется streaming. Monitoring показывает: offline = $85, online = $120. Что происходит?

options.text: Training-serving skew: offline (training) и online (serving) compute разные значения. Причины: 1) разная логика вычисления (batch SQL vs streaming aggregation), 2) разное окно (batch = calendar 30d, streaming = sliding 30d), 3) different data completeness. Fix: единый feature definition, мониторинг drift между stores
Проблема в ML модели — нужно переобучить

questions.studyHint: Повторите раздел Training-Serving Skew — Detection и Monitoring
questions.explanation: Training-serving skew: модель обучена на offline features (batch), serving использует online features (streaming). Если compute logic отличается → prediction quality degrades silently. $85 vs $120 = 41% drift → significant. Monitoring: compare distributions offline vs online periodically. Alert при drift > threshold. Root cause: usually different implementation или different time semantics.

questions.question: Fraud detection модель требует feature 'transaction_count_last_5_min' с latency < 100ms. Feature Store online store на Redis. Как обеспечить low latency?

options.text: Вычислять feature on-demand при каждом запросе к Feature Store

Streaming feature pipeline: Kafka (transactions) → Flink (sliding window 5 min, count per user) → write to Redis (online store). Feature lookup: Redis GET по user_id → pre-computed count. Latency: < 5ms (Redis). Flink обновляет на каждый event → near real-time freshness
Хранить все транзакции в Redis и считать COUNT при запросе

questions.studyHint: Повторите раздел Online Feature Serving и Streaming Features
questions.explanation: Streaming feature: pre-computed и materialized в Redis. Flink sliding window: каждый новый event → update count → write to Redis. Feature lookup: simple key-value GET (< 5ms). On-demand (a): latency depends on query complexity, unpredictable. Batch 5-min (b): stale для fraud (5 min delay). Full history in Redis (d): memory expensive, slow COUNT.
